 FLASHBACK ENDS***
*
  His friends gasped after he concluded his story, and Austin embraced him. 

   “I’m so happy, bro. You are finally back,” Austin said. 

   “Stop being clingy,” he muttered. 

 “Have you seen your father?” Micheal asked. 

   “Yeah. I came here right after,”

   “Why were those bltches with you Lia and Alicia,” Austin asked. 

   “We met by the gate. The security didn’t let them through. They had no invitation,”

   “How did you get the invitation? We only told you about the party, we didn’t send you an invite,” Austin said. 

   “You contacted Lina first?” Micheal asked. 

   “Yeah. I told her to keep it a secret. I wanted to surprise you,”

   “It a surprise indeed, but we have many more surprises,” Micheal said. 

  “First, let’s enjoy the party,” Steven said. 

  “Why is Jessica here? I thought it’s just Paulina’s friends,” Stanley said. 

   “She is Paulina’s friend now,” Austin said. 

   “Really?”

   “Are you uncomfortable?” Micheal asked. 

   “How did they become friends?”

   “Paulina left our club after the mid semester exam results were released. That girl is such an ingrate, she said she needs to be around more intelligent people to improve her grades, so she left our club and accepted Jessica’s offer to join the math club. They became close from there, you can see few people from the math club around,” Austin said. 

   “Oh… I see,” he muttered staring at her, but she didn’t even spare him a glance. 

  “Get over it, man. You ended it, remember?” Austin said, and Stanley chuckled. 

   “I’m over it. It’s not my first relationship. Speaking of first; Steve, why won’t you date anyone? Austin said Dianna has been hitting on you. Give it a shot, man. You have to have fun while you can, otherwise you will start dating Austin’s ex,” Stanley said. 

   “Hey!” Austin shouted. 

   “Do you have a girl you like?” Micheal asked, and they all looked at him. 

    “Yes, that could only be the reason,” Austin said, and Steven chuckled before looking around. “ Is she here? Lia or Alicia, perhaps Jessica? He added, and Stanley shot him a glare. 

   “Where is Paulina?” Steven asked. 

   “Is she the one you like?” Austin gasped, and Micheal looked at I’m. 

   “There she is. If you wiki excuse me, I have something to discuss with her,” with that, Steven left. 

   “I think he likes Paulina,” Austin said. 

   “Get your tact together, man. Otherwise you will lose your teeth!” Micheal lashed. 
*
  Steven went to Paulina, she welcomed him with a  smile and gave him his pendant. 

   “I don’t think I’m worthy enough to keep this,”

   “Come on, Steven. It’s yours. Even if you think you aren’t worthy of it, you shouldn’t throw it out,”

   “That’s why I asked you to keep it,”

   “I can’t keep it any longer. It has to be with it owner,”

   “I can’t live the way my mum wants me to. I already chose my path, so how can I keep that?” 

   “Your mother didn’t give you this because she wants you to live the way she wants, she gave you  this so she can watch over you. She wants to be close to you even though she is absent, so consider this little pendant as your mother,”

   “Just like your bracelet?”

   “Yes, like my bracelet,” she said all smiles, and he embraced her. 

   “Thank you, Lina. Thank you being my friend,” he said, and she patted his back gently. 

   “You are so such an adorable cutie,” she said, and he laughed. 

    “What are they talking about?” Micheal grumbled, staring at them. 

    “Steven can’t go for Lina, right?” Austij said. 

   “You talk too much. You are starting to klll the party’s vibe,” Stanley said. 
*
  The real party begins later, and they engaged on various fun events before some people retreat to do their own thing, some went to the poolside, and some dance to the music. 
**
**
  Ava refused to attend the party immediately her father brought the idea, and they didn’t bother to convince her with thoughts that she was feeling inferior because of her face. 

  She couldn’t help but think about the party all day, the thought of how Paulina wili slowly have everything while hiding at an illegitimate daughter was so overwhelming, and she decide to see what the party was like for herself. 

  She arrived at the venue, but the securities didn’t let her through because she has no invitation until Don showed her. 

   “Let her in, she is the chairman Stanford’s daughter,” Don said. 

  “Consider yourself fired!” Ava blurted, and went in. 

 “I’m sorry, madam,” the security guard shouted. 

  She walked around the party admiring everything, and cursing Paulina for stealing what was hers. She wandered around but no one noticed her presence until Paulina joined her at the balcony. 
*
 Don who has been keeping a close watch on Ava since she arrived at the party watched the little cat fight between Ava and Paulina, and he interfered when Ava was trying to push Paulina off. He was quick to separate them, and pushed Ava off instead. 

      “Noooooooo….” Paulina screamed. 

   “Miss Paulina, did you get hurt?” Don asked. 

   “Ava, Ava ,” she pointed at Ava who already fall off, and Don jumped over the balcony to meet her. 

   “Paulina,” people from the party called running to her. 

   “What happened?” Micheal and Sage asked rushing to her but Sophia dragged Sage back. 

   “Ava…” she shuddered in tears, and Micheal embraced her.

   “Oh, my God! It’s Ava!” Lia shouted, pointing down the balcony. 
**

    THE HOSPITAL^^^
^
  Paul rushed to the hospital immediately the heard what happened, and a doctor came to brief him about the surgery she was undergoing. 

 He went to the operating unit, and dismissed the kids to go home, remaining just him and Paulina. 

   “Paulina, what happened?” He asked, and Paulina looked at him in tears. 

   “Ava tried to push me off from the balcony,”

    “What?”

   “You might not believe it because you thought you raised such an angel,”

   “Paulina…”

   “Dad, Ava tried to klll me! I would have been the one in the OR if uncle Don didn’t interfere, I would have been the one fighting for my life!”

   “Did you two have a fight again?”

  “This isn’t just any fight, dad, Ava tried to klll me for real, she said she’d get rid of me and be your only daughter, she said she doesn’t want to share anything with me! I hate her…” she cried, and Paul embraced her. 

   “It’s ok, Paulina,” he said, patting her back but she freed herself from him. 

   “It’s not ok, dad. Ava will never accept me, and I refuse to accept her as well. I hope her surgery goes well, I hope she recover and answer to this, because I can’t live with her anymore!” Paulina said, and stood up 

   “What are you getting at?”

   “You have to choose, dad. I can’t live wigi someone who tried to klll me, no, I refuse to live with her. I don’t want to share anymore, dad. I don’t want to share anything with a ba$tard. Since she is the daughter you raised for years, and you can’t abandon her, then you will have to abandon me! You have to choose dad, it’s either me, or Ava!” She blurted, before leaving. 

   “Paulina…” Paul shuddered, staring at her retreating back till she was out of sight. 

  Paulina was heading out of the hospital in tears when she sight a familiar face walking towards her. She wiped her tears to be able to see properly, and the person turned out to be her mother. 

   “Ghosts indeed wander around at hospital,” she thought in tears. “I wish it was really you, mum, I wish I wasn’t seeing a ghost,” she cried. “But why is the ghost coming closer?” she thought. 

   “Paulina…” Charlotte called 

  “She just called my name…” she shuddered. 

   “My baby,” Charlotte cried, running towards her. 

   “Why is she in tears? She is coming closer,” Paulina thought. “Is she really my mum?” she muttered, and wiped her tears. “Mum?” she called. 

   “My baby, my Paulina. Mummy is sorry for being so late,” Charlotte said, and embraced her. 

   “It wasn’t a ghost, it’s really mum,” Paulina muttered in tears, tightening the hug. “Mum,” she cried.

   THE HOSPITAL ^^^
^
  Ava’s surgery was successful, and she was transferred to a ward for close monitoring till she recovers. 

 Paul checked on her at the ward, and was about to leave when he saw t he security guards at the VIP unit harassing a man(Leo). 

   “Chairman, sir. How is Ava?” Leo asked, and Paul looked at him. 
     
    “Chairman, we saw him snooping around,” the security said, and Paul nodded. 

     “The surgery was successful, but we have to wait for her to wake up,” Paul said, and Leo sighed in relief. 

   “That’s a relief, thank you, sir,” he muttered. 

    “Do you care for coffee?” Paul asked, and Leo looked at him. 
*
  They both went to the cafeteria to get coffee, and Leo tried to relax. 

   “I know who you are, you are her biological father,” Paul stated, and Leo looked at him. 

   “Thank you for raising, Ava. Sir,” he managed to say, and Paul chuckled. 

   “Thank you? For raising my own child?” He said, and Leo looked at him. “It’s not right to thank me. I raised Ava for 18 years fully aware that she wasn’t my daughter,”

   “May I ask why you raised her even though you were aware from the start?”

   “Because she was cute,” he said, and Leo looked at him. “She was a cute baby girl. I was home alone with her that day… the maids were all downstairs and her nanny was away to get some things for her. Her mother had other arrangements, and she was crying, I went to her room disgusted, but she stretched her little hands to me, I carried her, and she stopped crying at the instant. She was so cute, she was cute back then, and even now. I vowed to protect her. That was the child I raised, but now, I don’t think I can keep on protecting her. Yet again, I’ll fail another promise,” he said, and Leo looked at him. 

   “Is it because of me? Please, don’t mind me. I will never show up to Ava again,” 

   “Not because of. A lot of things have been happening, and I believe Ava needs time to accept her place, and adapt to the new change. I plan to send her abroad after she recover, she can also undergo her plastic surgery there,”

   “Oh, you are sending her abroad…”

   “You might not be able to see her if she leaves, do you have any objections ?”

    “No, no. Not at all, sir. I appreciate your efforts for raising Ava all these while, and you are even sending her abroad, so who am I to protest?”

   “You are her father, her biological father,” Paul said, and Leo looked at him. “I know how you feel, because I recently reunite with my biological daughter as well, and I’m sending Ava abroad because of her. So feel feee to show your concern,”

    “Sir… I just wish to see her one last time before she leaves. I know she won’t be glad to see me, but I just want to see her even if it’s from a distance,” 

   “How long do you want to look at her from a distance?”
    
    “Sir?”
    
   “You must have been doing that all these while, that’s how you could easily tell that she was here. So how long do you want to keep that up?”

   “I-…”
   
   “Feel free to visit her at the hospital at anytime, I’ll inform the security as well. Don’t thank me, I’m also a father and I won’t deprive you the rights of being a father to your child,” with that, he left. 
**
**
 Paulina held her mother all day as she told her stories about her survival, how she survived all murder attempt, and overcome the clinical challenges that came right after. They wept together, and smiled at each other, enjoying a beautiful mother and daughter’s moment. 

   “Mum, now that you are back, everything is settled. Dad can just be with Ava, and we can return home together, we can bring grandpa with us as well. I really missed you, mum,” 

   “Home?” 

   “Yes, mum. Home to the countryside,”

   “Do you want to return back there? Don’t you like the city?”

    “I like here, but I love wherever you are,” she said, and embraced her mother tight. 

   “You are Paulina, we should return home, and that home is wherever we can be together,” she said, and Paulina smiled. 
   
   “I have really missed you, mum. I thought I was never going to see you again,”

   “I was scared too, but thanks to someone, I was able to come this far,”

   “Who? The friend who have been assisting you?”

   “Yes, I want you to meet him. He will be here shortly,” Charlotte said, and almost immediately, Louis joined them at the cafeteria. 

   “Charlotte. Oh, you must be Paulina,” Louis said. 

   “Doctor?” Paulina called as she instantly remembered him. 

   “Have you two met before?” Charlotte asked. 

   “Mum, he was Ava’s Doctor, we met a few months ago,” 

   “Oh…”

  “Thank you so much for everything, sir.” she said, and Louis’s shook his head feigning a sad expression. 

   “Not that, Paulina. I’m a very close friend of your mother, and I was close to your father too. So I deserve more than that formal treatment. Give me a hug. I’m your uncle,” he said, and spread his arms. 
 
  They all laughed, and she walked into his embrace all smiles. 

   “Thank you for everything, uncle,”

    “If you are thankful then let’s hangout later,” he winked, and she smiled. 
 
 Paulina returned to her seat next to her mother, and Louis took the seat opposite them. 

   “Is Paul aware of this meeting?” he asked. 

  “Dad knew that you were alive?” 

   “I’m sorry, baby, I asked him to keep it from you,”

   “Why are you so mean, mum? Everyone knows expect me,”

   “I’ll make up for it,” 

   “I assumed he isn’t aware yet,” Louis muttered, and Charlotte nodded. 

    “I already texted dad, he eats us to have dinner together,” 

    “Will you invite Paul?”

    “Paul has no reasons to be there,”

    “Then I’ll be the one to inform him about this. Is Paulina coming with us now?”

    “Yes. She refused to let me go,” Charlotte said, and they all laughed. 
**
  Louis drove Paulina and Charlotte to his house, and they were surprised to meet Paul there. 

   “What’s dad doing here?” Paulina said, and held her mother’s hand. 

   “Louis… did you ask him to come?” Charlotte asked. 

  “Nope. I told him not to worry, that Paulina was with us. He must have come to fetch her,” 

  They alighted from the car, and Paulina held her mother tightly, staring at her father. 

   “Paul, what are you doing here?” Charlotte asked, and Paul wrong to embrace her taking everyone off guard. 

   Louis excused himself, and Paulina stared at them emotionless. 

    “You’d well, Charlotte. It’s all over now, and you can be with Paulina again,” he said, and Charlotte freed herself from him. 

   “Are you here to tell me that?”

   “Charlotte,”
    
   “We don’t need you here Paul, but since you are here, we can discuss about my daughter,”

    “Let’s do that later, that’s not why I’m here. Paulina have really missed you, you two can spend all the time you want together, but please… let me know if you decide to leave,” 

    “Why? As Paulina’s father?”

   “Charlotte, I have done a lot of unforgivable things, and I know I don’t have the right to fight for anything-…”

     “Since you know that, then, leave!”

    “Paulina… is still my daughter,” he muttered. “I’ll take my leave now. Paulina, take care and don’t cause your mother and Louis any trouble,” he said, and Paulina nodded before he left.

  They went in and met Louis unpacking their bags, she just retuned from the UK, she hasn’t even unpacked before she went to Paulina. 

   “Did Paul left?” He asked. 

   “Yes,” Charlotte muttered.

   “Uncle, let me assist you,” Paulina said. 

   “Thank you… but I should be doing this in my room, I don’t even know why I’m unpacking here,” he said, and Charlotte chucked. 

 “I’ll go prepare some coffee for us,” Charlotte said. 

   “Thank you. I’ll inform Ms. Bella of our arrival tomorrow. So prepare the coffee, e-bike I keep Paulina company,” 

   Paulina sighted their childhood picture, and picked it. 

   “That’s your parents and I when we were younger,” Louis said. 

   “I know. Dad told me,” 

   “Wow. Your father must have tell you a lot of things then,”

  “Not really, he didn’t tell me Wip the other girl is. Did you lost contact with her?” 

   “Grace?” Louis said. 

   “Is she Ms. Grace?”

   “Yes. Grace, your father and I grew up together. We have been friends since we were born, influenced by our parent’s friendship , and your mother joined later, and we  became that beautiful squad,” Louis said, remembering their beautiful memories. 

  “So what happened?” Paulina asked. 

   “A lot happened. I left first, and cut ties with them, but somehow I was able to reunite with your mother again. I’ll tell you a lot of stories about your mother later,” he said,

   “Dad left mum… and went to her friend, I mean his other friend,”

   “Paulina, there is a long story behind it. Trust me, it’s a really boring one so don’t let us bore the moment. I’ll only tell you the fact about it all. I know Paul for the first 10 years of my life, he was my best friend. So I know he tried all he could to protect your mother, but he was left with no choice. Your father is not a bad person,” Louis said, and patted her hair while she nodded.

 Mr. Ethan joined them later, and they all spend time together, and words couldn’t describe how happy Paulina was to be reunited with her mother, and grandfather.

   “I wonder who was behind the video,” Steven grumbled.

   “We can handle it together,” Austin grumbled as they took their leave.

   “Lina,”

   “Hi, Mike,”

   “Have you seen this?” He asked, showing her the video. “I doubt,” he added, and she gasped.

   “I’m sorry, Mike,”

   “Then I assume you already decide. Let’s go in, I’ll make sure the school deletes the post as soon as possible. Don’t worry, no one will come at you while I’m here,” he assured, and she nodded.

   “Hi, Pauli,” they heard, and they both turned to look at the person.

   “I never knew he attend this school. He was my friend from my former school,”

   “Orion, it’s a surprise that you are here.  I mean…”

    “Wow. You never told me your parents were influential,” Paulina said, and Micheal scoffed. 

   “It’s nothing to brag about,” 

   “Lina, my legs are aching. Let’s go!” Micheal snapped, and dragged her away. 

   “Hey? Why are you acting like that?” 

   “Didn’t you see yourself, fllrting with another guy while I was there, standing,”

    “I wasn’t fllrting with him, he is my friend,” 

   “ I recalled you said “was”. How did you even became friends with him, I mean… you barely keep company of friends,”

    “We teamed up for a competition together in middle school, so we became close from there. He is very intelligent,”

   “Oh, I see… now intelligence is the trend,” he grumbled, rolling his eyes, and Paulina laughed. 

   “You’re funny,”

   “Wait. Pauli, Pauli. Why does he keep calling you that?”

   “I don’t know. He just calls me that,” she muttered, blushing softly and Micheal rolled his eyes. 

  Jessica approached them later, and Paulina left with Jessica while Micheal headed to his suite. 

   “Man, what now?” Austin asked. 

   “Stanley, make sure that post on the website got deleted. I won’t say than that,” Micheal said, and Stanley nodded while Austin scoffed.

   “Stan, we told you we have a lot of surprises for you,” Steven said trying to change the topic.

    “That’s the spirit, bro. I wanted you to fly back,”
Austin said. 

  “What’s it? I’m already curious,” 

   “Steven became an anonymous mafia boss,” Micheal said, and Stanley gasped. 

   “What? How did it happen?”

   “Lord shark tried to kill me, he was my father’s right hand man. Mr. Kim, my father’s new bodyguard rescued me, and that was when we discovered that he has been slowly kllling my father with harmful substances in disguise of medicine,”

   “What?”

   “I had to take action. My father was too weak to control his men, and they won’t follow Mr. Kim instructions, so I have to go back home and give them the order myself. I got rid of lord shark,”

   “You kllled him?”

   “I didn’t. But I ordered it,”

   “Bro, Steven is really fearsome,” Austin said. 

    “Indeed,” Stanley grumbled in fear, and Steven chuckled. “What happened to your father?”

    “He needs to treat himself, the polsion already spread, so he might not last long. He retreat abroad, and put me in charge. I couldn’t say no, he would have stayed back and dled if I refuse. I couldn’t believe he was taking the medicines knowing fully well that it was harmful because he wanted me back home,”

   “Wow. Now I’m friends with a mafia boss!” Stanley exclaimed. “At the end, you choose that path. I believe that was the path for you from the start,”

   “I agree. He is too skilled to be anything else,” Austin said, and they all laughed. 

   “Stan, you all think I’ll be the first to get married, but Austin could likely be the first,” Micheal said, and Stanley looked at Austin. 

   “Did your parents arranged it?” Stanley asked, with widened eyes. 

    “They both know I won’t accept,” 

   “So what?” Stanley shouted. 

    “It’s Rae…” he muttered, and started the long story.

I instantly made up mg mind not to like anyone first, and just get in a relationship for fun. We are all teenagers, it’s not like we will get married or something. So why follow the heart? I’m telling you this so you can avoid me as well, get over whatever feelings you have for me, because we will never be together. I’ll start avoiding you now, it’s understandable, I just confessed my feelings,” she said, and stood up to leave.

   “But, marry?”

   “A boyfriend can breakup with you, but there are vows attached to marriage. It will take a lot of thinking before one can break those vows and separate. So, instead of my girlfriend, be with me forever so we won’t have to breakup,” 

  “Austin, are you listening to yourself?” 

 “Just like you, I also don’t want to get heartbroken. Let’s get married, Rae. Me and you, when we are ready,” he said, and kissed her.

I'll go get the doctor, with that he left.

Paul rushed to the hospital after the doctor called to inform him that Ava was awake, he went to her ward and met the doctor there in company of Leo.

Doctor why's she still asleep? You told me she was awake.

Yes, but we have to put her back to sleep. I'll explain the reason to you. Let's kindly talk outside," the doctor said and Paul followed him out.

Paul looked at the doctor already impatient and the doctor started using their medical term.

As I explained before the surgery, the CT scan showed swelling and bleeding in both temporal lobes. She's regained consciousness, but the injury has disrupted her hippocampus --- the part of the brain responsible for memory. I'm afraid she's been diagnosed with amnesia.

What? Paul shouted, unable to believe his ears.

   THE HOSPITAL ^^^
^
 Ava has been in the hospital for a week, only to diagnosed with amnesia after she woke up. Paul didn’t know how to react to the news, telling her about everything that has happened when she can’t remember anything will be really hard on her so he decide to leave her in the dark. 

Weeks has passed since she woke her, and everything else was fine expect her memories. 

 Paul went to her ward and met her having a conversation with Leo, the both of them got along the moment she woke up and he introduced himself as his father. 

   “Daddy, it’s the chairman,” she said upon seeing him. 

  Paul managed to force a smile, and walked close to them. After Leo introduced himself as her father, he has to introduce himself as chairman Stanford who was funding her medical expenses. 

   “Ava, I’m happy to see that you are in good shape now,” 

    “Thanks for coming to check up on me again, it must’ve been really stressful. Thank you,” 

    “Yeah, that’s my angel,”

   “Pardon?”

   “I mean you are an angel,” he said, and she smiled. 

  Seeing her that way reminded him of when she was younger, she was a really sweet girl. But everything suddenly changed, influenced by her grandfather. 

   “I’ll be on my way now,”

   “It seems like you don’t have other business at the hospital,” Ava said, and he looked at her. 

   “Yeah, I came to checkup on you,”

    “You don’t have to worry too much about me. Daddy is here, and the doctor said I can be discharged soon. I’m fine now, sir,” 

   “Obviously! I wish you would really be completely fine,”

    “I also wish to recover my memories, but the doctor said it might be highly impossible. But I’m fine, what matter is that I build new beautiful memories. Daddy, said so,” 

    “Your dad said so. I see… new beautiful memories. Yes. That’s what matters. You should only build beautiful memories,”

     “I agree,”

    “She will be discharged soon?” Paul said, and Leo nodded. 

    “Yes. The doctor assured us that everything is fine now. The amnesia is the only problem,”

   “Where are you going after her discharge? We never discussed that,”

    “Daddy said we are going to New York, my grandma is there. I spoke with her on the phone, and she is expecting us. I can’t wait to meet her,” Ava said. 

   “Grandma? New York? Leo, you should see me off,” Paul said. 

    “Alright, sir,” Leo muttered looked at Ava who smiled at him before they left.
*
  Paul and Leo went outside the ward, and Paul glared at him. 

   “New York? When do you plan to tell me about that?”

   “I’m sorry, sir. I just discussed it with Ava today, I plan to tell you about it later,”

    “Now my opinions don’t even matter, right?”

    “I’m sorry, sir. I thought I could make the decision at least since you promised to give me full authority over Ava,”

    “What do you plan to tell her after the discharge? Her identity as a Stanford can’t be erased forever even though she don’t remember,”
     
    “I already told her that everything,”

    “Everything?”

   “Not really everything, but the facts that she can understand,” 

   “What did you tell her?”

   “That her late mother was married to you, and you were like a father to her. She is now aware that you were once her father, and she was a Stanford before before we reunited and the accident happened,”
    
    “Goodness! You did all that without informing me?”

   “I’m sorry, sir,”

    “So, to New York? Don’t take her away without informing me, I’ll prepare the private jet for you. And about your living there-…”

    “Sir! I won’t hide Ava from you, I promise. But please… would you allow me have full authority over her? You have been her father for 18 years… I felt like this is an opportunity for me to be with my daughter. I don’t want you to come between us. I know I’m being selfish, but…”

    “It’s fine. Since you won’t hide her from me, then it’s fine. Just keep me updated, and remember that I will always keep an eye on you,” with that, Paul left. 
**
 Don dropped off Paulina at the hospital. Her father told her about Ava’s current health condition, and she felt it’s right to pay her a visit at least. 

  She entered the hospital and was surprised to see Ava helping a child who dropped her toy from afar. The little girl was on a wheelchair, and Ava was walking around with her drip. 

  She smiled at the little girl, and her gaze met Paulina, and she didn’t stop staring at her. 

   “Did she really have amnesia? She seems to recognize me,” Paulina thought walking closer to her. 

   “So beautiful,” Ava said when Paulina gets closer, and Paulina looked at her. 

   “Hun?”
    
   “Nothing. You are just beautiful, and your face is smooth too,” Ava said, before touching her own scar. 

   “You are also beautiful, Ava,” Paulina said, and Ava looked at her. 
   
    “You know me?”

   “Hun?! Actually… I know you,”

   “You must be Paulina?”
    
    “Hun? Yes, I… I’m Paulina,” 

   “Oh. You must be the chairman’s daughter, no wonder you are beautiful,” Ava said, and Paulina forced a smile. 

    “It’s real, she really lost her memories,” Paulina thought, staring at her pitifully.

  CHAIRMAN STANFORD’S MANSION^^*
^
 Paul was working in his study when he heard a knock on the door before it click open. Since Paulina left the house, he was always home alone with the workers, so he wondered who dares do barge into his study. 

 Paulina walked in, and his face brightened in a smile.

  They both went to his living room later to talk properly.

     “You once asked me to choose, so I already made my choice. Ava is out of the picture now,”

I want to introduce you to the world as my daughter,” he said, leaving Paulina speechless.

   “So?” They all chorused.

The school director approved a decree to allow all students from the math club of all classes to participate in the test competition. Aren’t you confident enough? You are a genius,”

   “Orion Blake. His family run a logistics company,”

   “What?” They all shouted.

    “I know. I don’t want to do this either. But it’s just my fate. I will put Mr. Kim in charge soon, so I can leave a normal life like the real anonymous mafia boss,” 

    “You will be like your father?” Stanley remarked. 

   “I should be better than him. I’ll take care of somethings so I won’t have to be like him. I plan on making us run a smooth business,”

   “I hope you succeed. Being a mafia is quite scary most especially when you don’t even want it,” Stanley said.

Is that your way of proposing? You didn't even ask me to be your date to prom, and now you're proposing to me like this? She lashed.

I was going to ask you to be my date later tonight, I already prepared everything.

Get lost! She blurted and ran off.

Hey! Are you still mad at me? He whined running after her.

She ran around in the beach and started throwing sands and water at him, he ran after her doing the same, until they laid on the sand already exhausted.

We'll get very busy after prom, we might not be able to meet often.

Because of Austin's wedding?

Yes. We have to make it go down in history.

My mom's wedding is right after.

So you are going to Germany?

We're going to Germany. You promised to come with me.

If course, you mean we, he said and she scoffed.

Since we'll get busy later, we should spend as much time as we can together, he said and she looked at him.

Yes we should, she muttered, and he kissed her, and she wrapped her arms around his neck and deepen the kiss.

THE END!! ‼️
